sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74493" key="o)pisqo/pontos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθό-ποντος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-πονδ,<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ος</itype> </foreign> cod.), sine expl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
